shared_properties: Timer panel footprint remains 64x12 px so four 8 px digits, one colon, and 4 px padding fit cleanly in the upper-right HUD zone.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while panel colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
The panel leaves enough negative space for the 8 px font atlas to render MM:SS without crowding.
differences: This asset provides a dark backing plate, colon anchors, and a subtle right-edge notch rather than baked numeral glyphs.
Panel styling avoids any distance, floor, or progress indicators so only elapsed survival time appears.
The left edge uses a 1 px amber tick to help the eye find the timer against the dark shaft background.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the upper-right MM:SS timer location, 8 px font size, and the deliberate absence of any depth progress meter.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the restrained retro HUD language so the timer stays readable without lightening the overall mood.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds player-facing urgency by keeping the timer compact and always visible during descent.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle for static HUD art and SpriteSheetBundle for multi-state overlays and gauges that swap atlas indices.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load UI textures during the shared Loading state and store handles in a HudVisualRegistry keyed by asset_key so gameplay systems never parse filenames.
runtime_notes: Anchor UI nodes to whole pixels in the 1280x720 output space while the gameplay layer is upscaled from 320x180.
Keep the friction gauge, HP strip, and timer on a dedicated HUD layer above parallax and hazard sprites.
Swap overlay states by atlas index or visibility flags instead of rebuilding UI trees during pause, fail, or clear transitions.

context.usage: Upper-right backing plate for a live MM:SS survival timer.

acceptance_criteria: Timer panel is exactly 64x12 px and reserves a centered 40x8 px text lane for MM:SS digits plus a colon.
Panel art contains no floor count, minimap cue, or progress bar motif.
The left amber tick uses #E07B39 and the backing plate stays within #0D0D0F and #1A1A2E only.
